metadata.description: AIAgentMinder — an opinionated workflow governance layer for Claude Code, built for solo developers.

plugins.name: aiagentminder
plugins.description: An opinionated governance layer for Claude Code, built for solo developers. Autonomous sprint execution, worktree-isolated items, quality gates, TDD workflow, scope control, architecture fitness, and pre-PR code review — workflow enforced by hooks, not just rules. Installs via /plugin marketplace add lwalden/AIAgentMinder.
